key.name: cluster-poll-interval-seconds
key.description: This is the seconds after extension updates the cluster reachability for the context

key.name: kubeconfig-dir
key.description: Directory scanned for kubeconfig files. Empty means ~/.kube. A leading ~ is expanded to the home directory.

key.name: extra-kubeconfig-paths
key.description: Additional kubeconfig files or directories to include, outside the main directory.

key.name: sync-kubeconfig-env
key.description: Write the merged KUBECONFIG to ~/.config/environment.d so new terminals see the same contexts and current context. Takes effect after the next login.
